report.summary: Drafted 6 social posts + 1 educational thread (5-part) + 1 Discord/TG announcement + 1 full newsletter section with UPDATED market data: $1B+ liquidations (up from $299M earlier), Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear), Iran deadline expires TONIGHT. Created 2 SVG social cards (Extreme Fear historical signal + Deadline Day dashboard). Shifted narrative from crisis reporting to 'extreme fear = opportunity' data-driven framing.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Deadline Day tweet — Iran ultimatum expires tonight, $1B+ liquidations, Fear & Greed at 10, links to fear-greed-timeline
Extreme Fear = Opportunity tweet — historical data showing every sub-15 F&G reading preceded a rally (Jun 2025 +53%, Sep 2025 +75%, Jan 2026 +19%)
CLARITY Act tweet — stablecoin yield deal as bullish counter-narrative to geopolitical fear
Navigate Extreme Fear 5-part thread — educational breakdown of fear mechanics, geopolitical scenarios, what to do/not do, tool links
Smart Contract Security Guide spotlight — $17B exploit problem, new guide promotion
Weekend engagement poll — 'What did you do when Fear & Greed hit 10?' (bought/sold/DCA'd/nothing)
Discord/Telegram announcement — comprehensive market snapshot with Iran deadline context, tool links, regulatory bullish framing

Newsletter section (Thu Mar 27) — full weekly digest covering Iran crisis ($1B liquidations), CLARITY Act breakthrough, institutional whale accumulation (8,400 BTC), 4 new guides, Fear & Greed historical data

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: 2026-03-23-social-card-extreme-fear.svg — 1200x630 OG card with Fear & Greed gauge (score 10), historical rally data bars (3 previous extreme fear instances with % gains), current 'NOW' indicator at $69K, red/amber accent scheme

2026-03-23-social-card-deadline-day.svg — 1200x630 OG card with 4 stat boxes (BTC $69K, liquidations $1B+, F&G 10, Brent $112/bbl), longs-wiped bar chart (98% longs), token prices, deadline-day badge, red urgency color scheme

sections.title: Market Context (Updated)
items: BTC at ~$69,000 — down from $70.7K after Trump's 48-hour Iran ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz
Fear & Greed Index at 10 (Extreme Fear) — lowest reading since Jan 2026. Only hit sub-15 four times this cycle.
$1B+ in crypto liquidations since Saturday. ~$980M in longs wiped (98% of total). Previous report underestimated at $299M.
Brent crude at $112.19/bbl on Strait of Hormuz closure risk
Iran responded to ultimatum: threatened to close strait entirely and strike Gulf energy/water infrastructure
DEADLINE TONIGHT: Trump's 48-hour window expires Monday evening (Mar 23)
Institutional accumulation continues: whale addresses (1,000+ BTC) added ~8,400 coins during the dip
Standard Chartered maintains $150K BTC year-end target. Goldman cites improving liquidity conditions.
CLARITY Act: Banking Committee markup targeted for late April after Easter recess (Apr 13). Polymarket: 69% odds of signing.

sections.title: Strategy Notes
items: Narrative shift: Previous cycle (v1) focused on crisis reporting. This cycle (v2) reframes to 'extreme fear = historical opportunity' — more actionable, more data-driven, more aligned with degen0x brand.

Tool relevance is at cycle-high: Fear & Greed Timeline, DCA Calculator, Liquidation Heatmap, and Portfolio Tracker are all maximally relevant during extreme fear events. Every social post ties back to tools.
Bullish/bearish balance: Iran coverage (bearish) balanced with CLARITY Act progress + institutional accumulation (bullish). Newsletter ties both threads together.
Historical data framing builds credibility: showing that every sub-15 F&G reading preceded a rally positions degen0x as analytical, not emotional.

DEPLOY BLOCKER STILL ACTIVE: Git locks persist (7 days). 4 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE. New guide links (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) won't resolve until deployment. Social posts link to existing live pages to avoid broken links.
600 pages now in PUBLISHED_PAGES config, but only 413 are deployed to production (last deploy Mar 17). Gap of ~187 pages between local config and live site.
